headline: Solvac publishes its 2025 Annual Report
summary: Brussels, 2 April 2026 - 10.30 am CET Solvac has released its 2025 Annual Report today. This document includes, as already communicated on March 6, 2026, the management report, the financial statements and the corporate governance declaration for the 2025 financial year. The report also presents Solvac’s purpose, clarifies its mission and outlines its vision. The 2025 Annual Report, including the ESEF version, is available on Solvac’s website in French and Dutch.
